bio.zh: Maxim De Cuyper是左路后卫球员，具备边路推进和传中能力，可为球队提供左侧宽度。
bio.en: Maxim De Cuyper is a left-sided defender who can progress down the flank and deliver width from wide areas.

bio.zh: Arthur Theate是左脚中后卫，也可客串左路防守位置，以对抗和出球能力增强后场选择。
bio.en: Arthur Theate is a left-footed centre-back who can also cover on the left side, adding physicality and build-up options.

bio.zh: Koni De Winter是防线多面手，主要司职中后卫，可为比利时后场带来年轻活力和轮换深度。
bio.en: Koni De Winter is a versatile defender, mainly used at centre-back, who brings youthful energy and depth to Belgium's back line.

bio.zh: Zeno Debast是年轻中后卫，具备出球和阅读比赛的特点，是球队防线更新中的重要选择之一。
bio.en: Zeno Debast is a young centre-back noted for his ball-playing ability and reading of the game, making him part of Belgium's defensive renewal.

bio.zh: Nathan Ngoy是司职后卫的球员，可作为防线轮换人选，为球队提供身体条件和防守覆盖。
bio.en: Nathan Ngoy is a defender who can serve as a rotational option, offering physical tools and defensive cover.

bio.zh: Joaquin Seys是年轻后卫，通常在边路防守区域活动，可为球队带来活力和发展潜力。
bio.en: Joaquin Seys is a young defender, generally suited to wide defensive roles, who brings energy and developmental potential.

bio.zh: Kevin De Bruyne是比利时核心中场，以视野、传球创造力和远射威胁承担组织进攻的关键职责。
bio.en: Kevin De Bruyne is Belgium's key midfielder, known for vision, creative passing and shooting threat as a central playmaker.

bio.zh: Axel Witsel是经验深厚的中场球员，能够在中路提供控球稳定性、防守站位和比赛管理。
bio.en: Axel Witsel is a highly experienced midfielder who provides stability in possession, defensive positioning and game management.

bio.zh: Youri Tielemans是中场组织型球员，擅长传球调度和后插上射门，是球队中路的重要连接点。
bio.en: Youri Tielemans is a midfield organiser who links play with passing range and can contribute with late runs and shooting.

bio.zh: Dodi Lukebakio是进攻型边路球员，具备速度和一对一突破能力，可在边路制造威胁。
bio.en: Dodi Lukebakio is an attack-minded wide player with pace and one-on-one ability who can create danger from the flanks.

bio.zh: Alexis Saelemaekers是勤勉的边路中场，能够兼顾推进、压迫和防守回追，为球队提供战术弹性。
bio.en: Alexis Saelemaekers is a hardworking wide midfielder who balances progression, pressing and defensive tracking to add tactical flexibility.

bio.zh: Hans Vanaken是进攻型中场，擅长在前场串联和进入禁区，能够为球队提供身高与技术结合的选择。
bio.en: Hans Vanaken is an attacking midfielder who links play in advanced areas and arrives in the box, combining height with technical quality.

bio.zh: Nicolas Raskin是中场球员，风格积极，擅长逼抢和中路衔接，可增强球队的活力与对抗。
bio.en: Nicolas Raskin is an energetic midfielder who presses well and connects play through the middle, adding intensity and competitiveness.

bio.zh: Jeremy Doku是爆发力出色的边路攻击手，以速度、盘带和突破能力为比利时进攻打开空间。
bio.en: Jeremy Doku is an explosive wide attacker whose speed, dribbling and directness can open space for Belgium's attack.

bio.zh: Amadou Onana是身材高大的中场球员，擅长对抗、拦截和覆盖，为球队中场提供防守屏障。
bio.en: Amadou Onana is a tall midfielder who excels in duels, interceptions and coverage, giving Belgium a defensive shield in midfield.

bio.zh: Diego Moreira是年轻边路中场，具备速度和突破潜力，可作为进攻端的活力型选择。
bio.en: Diego Moreira is a young wide midfielder with pace and dribbling potential who can be an energetic attacking option.

bio.zh: Romelu Lukaku是比利时锋线支点型前锋，以力量、禁区终结和背身能力承担主要进攻职责。
bio.en: Romelu Lukaku is a powerful focal-point striker for Belgium, known for strength, penalty-area finishing and hold-up play.

bio.zh: Leandro Trossard是技术细腻的前场多面手，可胜任边锋或影锋角色，以跑位和终结能力丰富进攻。
bio.en: Leandro Trossard is a technically sharp forward who can play wide or as a second striker, adding movement and finishing quality.

bio.zh: Charles De Ketelaere是高大且技术型的前锋，可在中路或前腰区域活动，为球队提供串联与进攻变化。
bio.en: Charles De Ketelaere is a tall, technical forward who can operate centrally or between the lines, offering link play and attacking variety.

bio.zh: Matias Fernandez-Pardo是年轻前锋，具备前场机动性和成长潜力，可作为比利时进攻线的储备选择。
bio.en: Matias Fernandez-Pardo is a young forward with mobility and development potential, providing a depth option for Belgium's attack.

bio.zh: Fernando Muslera是乌拉圭经验丰富的门将，常以稳健的门线技术和领导力为球队提供保障。
bio.en: Fernando Muslera is an experienced Uruguayan goalkeeper known for steady shot-stopping and leadership in the squad.

bio.zh: Santiago Mele是司职门将的球员，具备门线反应和参与后场出球的能力。
bio.en: Santiago Mele is a goalkeeper who offers shot-stopping ability and can take part in building play from the back.

bio.zh: Sergio Rochet是乌拉圭门将，通常以稳定的扑救和禁区指挥能力承担重要角色。
bio.en: Sergio Rochet is a Uruguayan goalkeeper who is valued for reliable saves and command of his area.

bio.zh: Guillermo Varela是司职右后卫的防守球员，能够在边路提供防守覆盖和前插支持。
bio.en: Guillermo Varela is a right-back who can provide defensive cover and support attacks down the flank.

bio.zh: Ronald Araújo是身体素质出色的后卫，可胜任中卫和右路防守角色，是后防线的重要力量。
bio.en: Ronald Araújo is a physically strong defender who can play at centre-back or on the right side and is an important presence in the back line.

bio.zh: Sebastían Cáceres是司职中后卫的球员，特点是对抗积极并注重防守位置感。

bio.zh: Matías Viña是左路防守球员，可担任左后卫或边翼卫，为球队提供边路推进和防守平衡。

bio.zh: Joaquín Piquerez是司职左后卫的球员，能够在边路完成防守任务并参与进攻推进。
bio.en: Joaquín Piquerez is a left-back who contributes defensively while also joining attacking moves on the flank.

bio.zh: Maximiliano Araújo是左路多面手，能够在边后卫或更靠前位置提供速度和冲击力。

bio.zh: Mathías Olivera是乌拉圭左后卫，防守积极且具备前插助攻和边路覆盖能力。
bio.en: Mathías Olivera is a Uruguayan left-back who combines proactive defending with overlapping runs and wide coverage.

bio.zh: Santiago Bueno是司职中后卫的球员，通常以身高、对抗和防空能力参与后防轮换。

bio.zh: José Giménez是经验丰富的中后卫，以强硬防守、空中对抗和后场组织责任感著称。
bio.en: José Giménez is an experienced centre-back known for tough defending, aerial strength, and responsibility in organizing the back line.

bio.en: Federico Valverde is a complete midfielder who combines work rate, ball progression, and shooting ability, making him a key figure in midfield.

bio.zh: Steven Moreira司职后卫，通常可在边路防守位置为球队提供速度和推进能力。
bio.en: Steven Moreira is a defender who can offer pace and forward drive from wide defensive areas.

bio.en: Logan Costa is a defender who contributes with physical defending and ball distribution from the back.

bio.en: Diney Borges is a defender who offers a solid rotation option for the team's defensive unit.

bio.zh: Stopira是经验丰富的后卫，通常在边路或后防线为球队提供防守稳定性。

bio.zh: Sidny Lopes Cabral司职后卫，是佛得角队后防线中的年轻选择之一。
bio.en: Sidny Lopes Cabral is a defender and one of the younger options in Cape Verde's defensive group.

bio.en: Garry Rodrigues is a midfielder who can also support wide attacking play and brings experience to the team's forward transitions.

bio.en: Laros Duarte is a midfielder who can contribute with movement, linking play, and ball retention in central areas.

bio.en: Yannick Semedo is a midfielder who provides experience and positional options in the squad rotation.

bio.en: Hélio Varela is a forward who offers pace, directness, and depth to the attacking unit.

bio.zh: Edgardo Fariña是司职后卫的巴拿马球员，为中后卫位置提供年轻而有活力的选择。
bio.en: Edgardo Fariña is a Panamanian defender who offers an energetic option in central defense.

bio.zh: Jorge Gutiérrez是司职后卫的巴拿马球员，可作为防线轮换和补充人选。
bio.en: Jorge Gutiérrez is a Panamanian defender who can serve as a rotation and depth option in the back line.

bio.zh: Adalberto Carrasquilla是司职中场的巴拿马球员，常以控球、推进和组织串联球队。
bio.en: Adalberto Carrasquilla is a Panamanian midfielder who often links the team through possession, progression, and playmaking.

bio.zh: José Luis Rodríguez是司职中场的巴拿马球员，可在边路或前场区域提供速度与突破。
bio.en: José Luis Rodríguez is a Panamanian midfielder who can offer pace and direct running in wide or advanced areas.

bio.zh: Cecilio Waterman是司职中场的巴拿马球员，可为球队前场提供经验和进攻支点作用。
bio.en: Cecilio Waterman is a Panamanian midfielder who can bring experience and an attacking reference point to the team.

bio.zh: Édgar Bárcenas是司职中场的巴拿马球员，擅长在前场边路参与推进和创造机会。
bio.en: Édgar Bárcenas is a Panamanian midfielder who is comfortable advancing play and creating chances from wide attacking areas.

bio.zh: Aníbal Godoy是司职中场的巴拿马球员，常以防守覆盖、经验和中场平衡帮助球队。
bio.en: Aníbal Godoy is a Panamanian midfielder who helps the team with defensive cover, experience, and balance.

bio.zh: Alberto Quintero是司职中场的巴拿马球员，可凭借经验和边路技术丰富球队进攻选择。
bio.en: Alberto Quintero is a Panamanian midfielder who adds experience and wide technical options to the attack.

bio.zh: Carlos Harvey是司职中场的巴拿马球员，可在中场承担拦截、防守和简单出球职责。
bio.en: Carlos Harvey is a Panamanian midfielder who can handle ball-winning, defensive duties, and simple distribution.

bio.zh: César Yanis是司职中场的巴拿马球员，常在边路或前场位置提供速度和冲击力。
bio.en: César Yanis is a Panamanian midfielder who often provides pace and directness from wide or advanced positions.

bio.zh: Christian Martinez是司职中场的巴拿马球员，可为球队中场提供跑动、衔接和轮换选择。
bio.en: Christian Martinez is a Panamanian midfielder who offers work rate, link-up play, and rotation depth.

bio.zh: José Fajardo是司职前锋的巴拿马球员，主要在禁区附近承担终结和牵制防线的职责。
bio.en: José Fajardo is a Panamanian forward who primarily works around the box as a finisher and defensive focal point.

bio.zh: Ismael Díaz是司职前锋的巴拿马球员，可凭借速度和灵活跑位威胁对方防线。
bio.en: Ismael Díaz is a Panamanian forward who can threaten defenses with pace and sharp movement.

bio.zh: Tomas Rodriguez是司职前锋的巴拿马球员，为锋线提供冲击力和轮换选择。
bio.en: Tomas Rodriguez is a Panamanian forward who adds attacking energy and rotation depth to the front line.

bio.zh: Azarias Londoño是司职前锋的巴拿马球员，可作为年轻锋线选择提供活力和进攻补充。
bio.en: Azarias Londoño is a Panamanian forward who offers youthful energy and attacking depth.

bio.zh: Jordan Pickford是英格兰队的门将，以反应速度和大脚出球见长，常在后场承担稳定防线的角色。
bio.en: Jordan Pickford is an England goalkeeper known for sharp reactions and long distribution, often providing stability at the back.

bio.zh: Dean Henderson是司职门将的球员，风格积极，能够在门线扑救和禁区控制中提供选择。
bio.en: Dean Henderson is a goalkeeper who offers an active style, contributing with shot-stopping and command of the penalty area.

bio.zh: James Trafford是年轻门将，具备良好的脚下处理和门线反应，是门将位置的重要储备。
bio.en: James Trafford is a young goalkeeper with solid footwork and reflexes, serving as an important option in the goalkeeping group.

bio.zh: John Stones是技术型后卫，能胜任中卫并参与后场组织，是球队由守转攻的重要一环。
bio.en: John Stones is a technical defender who can play at centre-back and help build attacks from the back.

bio.zh: Dan Burn是身材高大的后卫，主要提供空中对抗、防守覆盖和左侧防线选择。
bio.en: Dan Burn is a tall defender who offers aerial strength, defensive coverage, and an option on the left side of the back line.

bio.zh: Ezri Konsa是司职中卫的防守球员，特点是位置感稳健、对抗可靠，可为防线提供深度。
bio.en: Ezri Konsa is a centre-back known for sound positioning and reliable defending, adding depth to the back line.

bio.zh: Trevoh Chalobah是一名英格兰后卫，具备中卫和边后卫位置适应性，通常以身体对抗和防守覆盖为球队提供后场选择。
bio.en: Trevoh Chalobah is an English defender who can operate across the back line, offering physicality, defensive coverage, and positional flexibility to the squad.

bio.zh: Reece James是右路后卫，兼具身体对抗、传中和推进能力，可在边路攻防两端发挥作用。
bio.en: Reece James is a right-sided defender who combines physicality, crossing, and ball progression on both ends of the flank.

bio.zh: Djed Spence是边后卫球员，速度和前插能力突出，适合在右路提供纵深。
bio.en: Djed Spence is a full-back with pace and forward-running ability, suited to adding width and depth on the right.

bio.zh: Marc Guéhi是中卫球员，防守沉着、出球简洁，是后防线的稳定选择之一。
bio.en: Marc Guéhi is a centre-back noted for calm defending and simple distribution, making him a steady defensive option.

bio.zh: Jarell Quansah是年轻中卫，身体条件和防守意识良好，是后防线的潜力型成员。
bio.en: Jarell Quansah is a young centre-back with good physical tools and defensive awareness, adding potential to the defensive unit.

bio.zh: Nico O'Reilly是司职后卫的年轻球员，可作为防线轮换与培养选择。
bio.en: Nico O'Reilly is a young defender who can serve as a rotational and developmental option in the back line.

bio.zh: Jordan Henderson是经验丰富的中场，擅长组织、覆盖和领导球队节奏。
bio.en: Jordan Henderson is an experienced midfielder who contributes organisation, coverage, and leadership in controlling the tempo.

bio.zh: Eberechi Eze是进攻型中场，擅长盘带、创造机会和在前场寻找空间。
bio.en: Eberechi Eze is an attacking midfielder known for dribbling, chance creation, and finding space in advanced areas.

bio.zh: Anthony Gordon是边路中前场球员，速度快、压迫积极，可在边路制造冲击。
bio.en: Anthony Gordon is a wide attacking player with pace and energetic pressing, capable of creating direct threat on the flank.

bio.zh: Declan Rice是中场核心型球员，兼具拦截、防守覆盖和向前推进能力。
bio.en: Declan Rice is a central midfielder who combines ball-winning, defensive coverage, and forward progression.

bio.zh: Morgan Rogers是中前场球员，身体条件出色，能通过持球推进和前场跑动参与进攻。
bio.en: Morgan Rogers is an attacking midfielder or forward who uses his physicality, ball carrying, and movement to support attacks.

bio.zh: Elliot Anderson是中场球员，能在中路提供跑动、连接和对抗，是阵容中的活力选择。
bio.en: Elliot Anderson is a midfielder who offers running, link-up play, and competitiveness as an energetic squad option.

bio.zh: Jude Bellingham是全能中场，具备推进、对抗、插上和组织能力，是球队中前场的重要人物。
bio.en: Jude Bellingham is an all-round midfielder with carrying, dueling, forward runs, and playmaking qualities, making him a key figure.

bio.zh: Kobbie Mainoo是年轻中场，控球冷静、传接球细腻，可在中路帮助球队保持节奏。
bio.en: Kobbie Mainoo is a young midfielder with composure on the ball and tidy passing, helping the team maintain rhythm centrally.

bio.zh: Marcus Rashford是前锋球员，常在左路或中路活动，依靠速度和冲刺制造威胁。
bio.en: Marcus Rashford is a forward who often operates from the left or centrally, using pace and direct runs to threaten defenses.

bio.zh: Ollie Watkins是中锋，跑动积极、压迫能力强，擅长利用身后空间冲击防线。
bio.en: Ollie Watkins is a centre-forward with energetic movement and pressing, effective at attacking space behind defenses.

bio.zh: Ivan Toney是中锋球员，身体对抗和支点作用突出，可为前场提供背身拿球与终结选择。
bio.en: Ivan Toney is a centre-forward who offers physical presence, hold-up play, and a finishing option in attack.

bio.zh: Harry Kane是经验丰富的中锋，兼具终结、回撤组织和传球能力，是前场核心之一。
bio.en: Harry Kane is an experienced centre-forward who combines finishing, dropping deep to link play, and passing quality as a key attacking figure.

bio.zh: Bukayo Saka是右路前锋，技术细腻、突破和传射能力均衡，是边路进攻的重要支点。
bio.en: Bukayo Saka is a right-sided forward with technical quality, dribbling, and balanced creative and scoring threat.

bio.zh: Noni Madueke是边锋球员，擅长一对一突破和内切进攻，可为球队提供边路爆点。
bio.en: Noni Madueke is a winger known for one-on-one dribbling and cutting inside, offering a dynamic wide attacking option.
